Calculation.Text: "View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"
SetProperty ( "level" ; FAT Tag Value::Level ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Tag::Title id ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Tag Value::Parent id )
FAT Tag Value::Level ≠ "Page item" And FAT Tag Value::Level ≠ "List item"

StyledText.Data: <<ƒ:Case ( FAT Tag Value::Level = "List item"; "List item"; FAT Tag Value::Level = "Page item"; "Page item"; FAT Tag Value::Level = "Page"; "Page"; FAT Tag Value::Level = "Chapter"; "Chapter"; FAT Tag Value::Level = "Package"; "Package"; FAT Tag Value::Level = "Package"; "Page" )>>
